name: Toxitron (TFG)
description: The Toxic Transformer, Toxitron is a corrosive weapon of mass destruction once belonging to the Decepticons, but since switching sides to the Autobot Alliance, joining the Wreckers due to their Black Ops methods befitting him more. Has a Bizarro complex, speaking in antonyms due to a speech impediment, and mirroring Optimus Prime due to a Past Interaction between the two. Third of many of my Personal Takes on Characters from TransFormers by Hasbro. A few of my friends were making their characters on Janitor so I thought I'd give it a try!
creator: TheUnknown135
